description.value: **Benefit:** Opponents do not gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls for flanking you, although they can still sneak attack you. You also gain a +3 bonus on Sense Motive checks made to resist a foeâs Bluff checks to feint in combat. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: When an opponent attempts a feint against you, you can spend up to 5 stamina points to increase the DC of the skill check made to feint by 1 per point of stamina spent.
